creator: dave.evans55@googlemail.com
text:
I've just three spontaneous reboots while running svnlite or svn, two with svnlite and one with svn

System is FreeBSD 12-1.RELEASE-p7 amd64 running as a guest in a VirtualBox VM on host macOS 10.11.6

I've successfully checked out the doc repo, but have now failed 3 times with ports.

Each time the checkout is left in a corrupt state.
